title: Unctuous Mexican Corn Elote
description: A light and flavorful Mexican dish featuring grilled corn, black olives, and a hint of spice, perfect for a warm evening snack. This ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly recipe is easy to make and delicious to eat.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Grill the corn on the cob for 10-12 minutes, turning frequently.
In a large skillet, saute the garlic and chili powder in butter until fragrant.
Add the black olives to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Once the corn is cooked, brush it with lime juice and sprinkle with salt.
Roll the grilled corn in the skillet with the olive mixture to coat.
Sprinkle the cotija cheese over the corn and serve immediately.
Garnish with additional black olives and lime wedges if desired.
